meta.name: Warship: Life on the Frontline
meta.description: Former Royal Marine JJ Chalmers is given exclusive access to the Royal Navy’s flagship, HMS Prince of Wales. Channel 5 cameras were invited on board to reveal how the crew of 1600 men and women live and work on board the biggest and most powerful British warship ever built, to witness them preparing for the most dangerous leg of its epic eight-month deployment.
